title: Basic harness flow: smoke validation
task: Verify that the harness can execute a minimal safe patch end-to-end without errors.
audience: CI pipeline / developers running a quick sanity check
constraints: Patch must apply cleanly without rejects
No blocking risk findings are allowed
Total score must reach the configured minimum threshold
successCriteria: Pipeline completes without throwing an unhandled error
At least one judge result is recorded
Artifacts directory is created and contains result files
nonGoals: Does not verify semantic correctness of the generated patch
Does not validate output against a golden file
risks: External adapter (localLlm) may be unavailable in CI
